creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tobik
Date: Fri Jun 15 14:20:14 UTC 2018
New revision: 472456
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/472456

Log:
  New port: x11/wmsystemtray

  wmsystemtray is a system tray dockapp using freedesktop.org system
  tray protocol.  It is designed to work with WindowMaker or another
  WM, that supports dock applications (FVWM, AfterStep).

  WWW: https://wmsystemtray.sourceforge.io

  PR:		229033
  Submitted by:	ILUXA <iluxa@ex.ua>

Changes:
  head/x11/Makefile
  head/x11/wmsystemtray/
  head/x11/wmsystemtray/Makefile
  head/x11/wmsystemtray/distinfo
  head/x11/wmsystemtray/pkg-descr
  head/x11/wmsystemtray/pkg-message
